title: Doctor / Logs / Plugins / Templates panels
description: Doctor: hybrid refresh (Q2) — structural live, network every 60s while focused. Logs: lifecycle.jsonl tail via SSE. Plugins/Templates: CRUD from existing CLI surfaces.

context.text: Implemented dashboard Doctor, Logs, Plugins, and Templates panels with backend state/routes, SSE lifecycle log tailing, plugin/template mutations, tests, E2E screenshots, security review fixes, and Codex adversarial review. Screenshots: ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-013-doctor-logs-plugins-templates-desktop.png and ~/Desktop/screenshots/sweech/T-DASH-013-doctor-logs-plugins-templates-mobile.png. Gates: npm run build; npm test -- --runInBand; npx tsc --noEmit; npm run typecheck:dashboard; npm audit --audit-level=moderate; npm run test:e2e:dashboard; swift build.
